meaning: adj.小心的,慎重的,有思虑的,贤明的
examples: They were gossipy and not always discreet.
Emporio Armani, the Italian fashion house, has made a discreet foray into furnishings.
We were very discreet about the romance.
The patrons of offshore tax havens may not think too hard about naming their discreet entities.
One of the marshals gave him a discreet pat on the back on the way out.
